environment.notes: Unofficial broker session and personal access tokens are not committed to the repo.

boundedBy: Robinhood access tokens and broker-session state must be supplied manually; repo evidence covers token failure and gateway seams but not a committed live session capture.

environment.notes: Quote readiness is polling-based rather than websocket-based for this adapter set.

boundedBy: Robinhood does not expose a public websocket feed for this adapter; Wave 1 relies on offline polling-path tests plus a future sanitized runtime note.

environment.notes: Brokerage submit and cancellation still require a real Robinhood session outside CI.

boundedBy: The unofficial brokerage surface can be stubbed in repo, but a sanitized live broker capture has not yet been committed.

environment.notes: The adapter is polling-oriented and rate-limit behavior is stubbed rather than transcript-backed.

boundedBy: Wave 1 has repo-backed throttling and cancellation tests, but no committed sanitized runtime reconnect note from a real broker session yet.
